image.title: Datadripco | Daily AI, Crypto & Tech News — Smart Analysis, Zero Fluff

item.title: DOD Labels Anthropic a Security Risk: 4 Ways Russian iPhone Hacks Are Accelerating AI Enterprise Pivots
item.description: With the DOD calling out Anthropic as a national security risk right as Russian hackers unleash advanced iPhone exploits on Ukrainians, businesses are racing to build their own AI setups like Mistral's Forge—here's how these developments are reshaping tech strategies and what it could mean for your operations this year.
